extraction_notes: Extracted from live homepage (full HTML + inline CSS). About and product pages unavailable (single-page site). Confidence: HIGH for colors, typography, voice. No Google Fonts detected — system UI stack only.

signal_notes.formal_casual: Uses 'you/your' throughout, plain language, '2 min application' → casual
signal_notes.rational_emotional: Large stats ($180M+, 91%) balanced with 3 personal testimonials → even split
signal_notes.playful_serious: Financial urgency, 'money in your account 48 hours' → serious/urgent
signal_notes.bold_subtle: Big number claims, 'No bank required', direct CTAs → very bold
signal_notes.traditional_innovative: 'Not banks — private lenders', '100+ lenders competing' → slightly innovative
signal_notes.expert_accessible: No jargon, removes friction framing, 'no impact to credit score' → very accessible

typography.pairing_descriptor: System UI stack only (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto) — no custom typeface loaded. Clean and fast-loading by design.
typography.weight_usage: 800–900 for headlines, 600–700 for body emphasis, 400 for body copy

imagery.style: flat design / text-forward with gradient backgrounds
imagery.composition: Clean, dark-background hero with gold accent elements; white cards on light backgrounds for content sections; minimal photography on live site
forbidden: unrealistic wealth displays (luxury cars, mansions, stacks of cash)
bank branch imagery (brand explicitly opposes banks)

brand_values: speed (24–48 hour funding is the core promise)
accessibility (not a bank — anyone can qualify)
transparency (no hidden steps, free to apply, no credit impact)

target_audience.profession: Small business owners, sole proprietors, entrepreneurs across all industries
pain_points: Slow funding timelines blocking growth opportunities
Cash flow gaps between invoices or slow seasons
Credit score concerns preventing access to capital
aspirations: Seize a growth opportunity quickly (new contract, inventory, expansion)
Cover operations during a slow period without closing
Avoid losing a deal due to lack of capital
Feel in control of their business finances

compliance_flags: Lead generation service for credit products — Meta Special Ad Category: Credit required
Cannot target by age, gender, or ZIP code on Meta
Must use Special Ad Audiences (not Lookalikes) on Meta
TCPA consent language already present on form — include in ads where possible
Do not use guaranteed approval language in ad copy
